Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sandborn Hydra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Sandborn Hydra is a Vessel that provides strength and fury to Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia Woodsman draws on the strength of a Sandborn Hydra.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Alchemists claim to offer the power of a Hydra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — A Sandborn Hydra possesses great strength and jumping ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Sandborn Hydra is a type of Kameira used by alchemists to enhance Meia's strength and durability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Sandborn Hydra is a type of Kameira.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — A Hydra is a type of Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Sandborn Hydra is a Kameira native to the Izyrian desert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Sandborn Hydra has the Intent to increase or decrease its own weight.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The cook wears the golden hide of the Sandborn Hydra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Sandborn Hydra provides a predatory fury that increases the user's weight and toughness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Urzaia's Soulbound Vessel is the golden hide of a Sandborn Hydra wrapped around his left arm.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
